event.name: Arrange the bones
event.description: This requires clearing out almost everything in the stall, just to allow you to walk around the creature. Your hammers, wire, and reconstruction implements are moved to a safe distance.

possession.name: Skeleton in Progress
possession.description: Are you reassembling something? Was that something ever alive?
possession.availableAt: Collect a skeletal torso and work on it in the Bone Market to develop a finished skeleton.

messages.message: You have begun work assembling a skeleton.
messages.tooltip: Are you reassembling something? Was that something ever alive?

possession.name: Approximate Value of Your Skeleton in Pennies
possession.nameAndLevel: Approximate Value of Your Skeleton in Pennies 6,250

messages.message: An occurrence! Your 'Approximate Value of Your Skeleton in Pennies' Quality is now 6,250!

possession.name: Skeleton: Skulls Needed
possession.nameAndLevel: Skeleton: Skulls Needed 1 - Your skeleton will need a skull
possession.levelDescription: Your skeleton will need a skull
possession.description: How many skulls would it take to complete your current skeleton project?

messages.tooltip: How many skulls would it take to complete your current skeleton project?

possession.name: Skeleton: Limbs Needed
possession.nameAndLevel: Skeleton: Limbs Needed 4 - Your skeleton is missing four limbs
possession.levelDescription: Your skeleton is missing four limbs
possession.description: How many limbs do you still need to add to your skeleton? They might be arms, legs, wings, or fins.

messages.message: Your skeleton needs four limbs to occupy all the joints available.
messages.tooltip: How many limbs do you still need to add to your skeleton? They might be arms, legs, wings, or fins.

possession.name: Skeleton: Tails Needed
possession.nameAndLevel: Skeleton: Tails Needed 1 - Your skeleton needs a tail
possession.description: How many tails does your skeleton need?

messages.message: Your skeleton is in need of a tail.
messages.tooltip: How many tails does your skeleton need?

possession.name: Skeleton: Torso Style
possession.description: What sort of torso are you using as the base of your skeleton?

messages.message: An occurrence! Your 'Skeleton: Torso Style' Quality is now 50 - Mammoth!
messages.tooltip: What sort of torso are you using as the base of your skeleton?

possession.name: Skeleton: Antiquity
possession.description: Is it old? Very old? Older than that?

messages.message: Your skeleton contains several bones from millennia ago.
messages.tooltip: Is it old? Very old? Older than that?

possession.name: Mammoth Ribcage
possession.description: The original animal must have been roughly the size of a chapel.
possession.availableAt: Given the right technology, you can create these in your Laboratory from human ribcages.

messages.message: You've lost 1 x Mammoth Ribcage (new total 4).
messages.tooltip: The original animal must have been roughly the size of a chapel.

possession.name: Palaeontologist
possession.nameAndLevel: Palaeontologist 647 - You have assembled an astonishing number of skeletons
possession.levelDescription: You have assembled an astonishing number of skeletons
possession.description: You have begun to assemble skeletons.

messages.message: You have assembled an astonishing number of skeletons.
messages.tooltip: You have begun to assemble skeletons.
